seoTitle: Stud Park vs Suffolk Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stud Park and Suffolk Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stud Park vs Suffolk Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stud Park and Suffolk Park.
heading: Stud Park vs Suffolk Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stud Park, New South Wales and Suffolk Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stud Park has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Suffolk Park (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stud Park or Suffolk Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stud Park has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Suffolk Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stud Park scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Suffolk Park scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stud Park or Suffolk Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stud Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
